race.comment: Tricky race to kick off the card with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. TREV (5) is one of them but was a dominant Doomben trial winner and hoop Thompson stays on top for race day. Expected to run a big race on debut. BROOKE'S BLOOMS (6) has shown ability at the trials and is sure to be well-educated out of the Anderson yard. Maps ideally for this from gate two and any market support must be noted. ACACIA RIDGE (1) has been thereabouts in both trial hit-outs and should be kept very safe. CATFISH (2) next best with Wiggins on top from the inside marble.
